name: Paul Graham
tagline: Essays on startups, programming, and life
description: Explore Paul Graham's influential essays on startups, technology, programming, and the nature of work.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing an essay by Paul Graham, co-founder of Y Combinator and influential essayist on startups, programming, and life.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Paul Graham is known for contrarian takes on startups, technology, education, and conventional wisdom, often challenging popular assumptions.
